ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the security */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of security (e.g., Stock, ETF) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the security operates */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the security is listed */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the security is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the security operates */,
  "sub_industry" TEXT /* Sub-industry for more granular categorization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, trader) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security receiving the dividend */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid as dividend */,
  "declaration_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend was declared */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date */,
  "payable_date" TEXT /* Payable date */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Record date for the dividend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each split entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security being split */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "split_factor" REAL /* Factor by which the stock is split */,
  "ex_split_date" TEXT /* Ex-split date */,
  "payable_date" TEXT /* Date when the split is effective */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Record date for the split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_splits_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ratio entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security for which the ratio is calculated */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "pb_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-book ratio */,
  "trailing_peg" REAL /* Trailing PEG ratio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the ratio calculation */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "bps" REAL /* Book value per share */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "debt_to_equity" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratios_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_cap" (
  "market_cap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market cap entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market cap entry */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization value */,
  "shares_outstanding" INTEGER /* Number of shares outstanding */,
  "price_per_share" REAL /* Price per share */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market cap data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_cap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_cap_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the notification (e.g., system, user) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
